pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies setting the threshold to 50 events.
Task description explicitly specifies setting the threshold to 1 minute.
Task description explicitly specifies enabling email notifications to soc-alerts@acmefinancial.com.
Task description explicitly specifies saving the screenshot to C:\workspace\ransomware_config_evidence.png.
Task description specifies the profile name, and web search confirms this is a standard built-in alert profile in ADAudit Plus.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the 'Possible Ransomware Attack' alert profile with a threshold of 50 events within 1 minute, and sending email notifications to 'soc-alerts@acmefinancial.com'. A screenshot must be saved to 'C:\workspace\ransomware_config_evidence.png'.
